underlying_goal: Migrate Aktiebevakning from user-level cron to systemd-based production deployment with proper secrets handling, then sync changes to GitHub
friction_detail: A line break in the initial sudoers command caused chmod to fail, requiring a follow-up command to complete the setup
brief_summary: User wanted to migrate a cron-based app to systemd with proper secrets management and push deploy infrastructure to GitHub; Claude completed the full migration, security review, and merge successfully.
